results.title: 10 Photos of Eve Hewson: Everything to Know About the 'Disclosure Day' Actress and Bono's Daughter
results.description: Eve Hewson, daughter of U2 lead singer Bono, stars in Steven Spielberg's 'Disclosure Day.' Here's a look at her career and rise in Hollywood.

results.title: Matt Smith, Emma D'Arcy, Olivia Cooke Bring The Glam At 'House Of The Dragon' London Premiere | N18G
results.description: 'House Of The Dragon' madness took over London on Monday evening as the star-studded cast gathered for the grand premiere of Season 3. Stars Matt Smith, Emma D'Arcy, Olivia Cooke, Steve Toussaint and several other cast members stepped out to celebrate the highly anticipated return of the hit 'Game Of Thrones' prequel. Check out all the highlights here.

results.title: Pokémon Go Candela's Quest for Victory research tasks
results.description: Candela's Quest for Victory is the last worldwide Pokémon Go event running alongside an in-person Go Fest 2026 event. This event in question is Go Fest Copenhagen, but you can still enjoy Candela's Quest for Victory if you're unable to attend. While raids have taken the spotlight (with more Pokémon appearing in them), there's also some event-exclusive research tasks to complete and Candela-themed accessory Ponyta has made a return. Read more
